adjudication_raw:
Review: Transformer electricity price forecasting.

Verdict: critique_wins

Frozen ARIMA across post-redesign market regime (the ARIMA cannot model scarcity dynamics introduced by the rule change), exogenous driver exclusion for convenience (gas/wind/load/outages withheld from ARIMA), and MAE as headline metric for a hedging application where top-5% price hours are what matter. All three issues confirmed by the paper's own text. The $3.80/MWh MAE advantage is substantially inflated by these compounding evaluation choices.
